name: HelpPanel
description: Slide-in help panel that appears from the right side of the window. Used to display contextual help content within app windows.

title.description: Optional title for the help panel

closeButton.description: Custom close button/icon slot - renders your own close button component

examples.name: Basic help panel
examples.code:
setShowHelp(false)}>

This is some helpful content.

examples.name: Custom title
examples.code:
setShowHelp(false)} title="Getting Started">

Welcome to the app!

examples.name: Custom close button
examples.code:
setShowHelp(false)} closeButton={}>

Content with custom close icon.
